notes: Fixed benchmark manifest for comparing RBC calibration strategies (vmax_only, km_only, joint_vmax_km, vmax_then_km, staged_full) under the same evaluation harness. Cases vary horizon, ATP protection, and curve-fit strictness without overriding the strategy selected in the policy file.

cases.name: baseline_mid_horizon
cases.description: Reference case aligned with the current policy defaults.

cases.name: short_horizon_low_forcing
cases.description: Tests whether the strategy can fit early dynamics with weaker experimental forcing.

cases.name: mid_horizon_atp_guarded
cases.description: Same horizon as baseline but with ATP/adenylate protection enabled.

cases.name: long_horizon_atp_guarded
cases.description: Longer horizon to penalize strategies that only work over short windows.

cases.name: alt_seed_robustness
cases.description: Checks optimizer robustness to stochastic search variability without changing the biological target.
